texts.t001: Smart India Enterprises engineers, installs and services entrance automation — from villa gates to toll-grade barriers and cleanroom high-speed doors — with genuine spares and pan-India dealer support.
texts.t004: Built for how your facility actually works
texts.t009: Fourteen complete product lines — designed, installed and serviced by SMARTIE, with SIE motors and genuine spares ex-stock Mumbai.
texts.t010: We spec by traffic, hygiene class and security level — not by brochure.
texts.t011: Watch live projects on our channels — gates, shutters and barriers in daily use across India.
texts.t012: Live projects from our YouTube channel — set your featured videos any time from the admin panel.
texts.t013: Real, verifiable reviews from our Google Business Profile — from late-night breakdown calls to full automation projects.
texts.t015: Do you offer AMC and after-sales service?
texts.t016: Are your products Made in India?
texts.t017: How do I get a quotation?
texts.t018: Yes — we execute pan-India through our dealer network across Mumbai, Ahmedabad, Bangalore, Lucknow, Delhi, Jaipur, Pune, Hyderabad and more, with Mumbai-based project supervision.
texts.t019: Yes — annual maintenance contracts, genuine spares ex-stock and trained service teams for everything we install.
texts.t020: SMARTIE is part of the MK family, in entrance automation since 1980. Our transparent PC folding door is India's only 100% Indian-make system, and the SIE motor range is engineered and supported from Mumbai.
texts.t021: Share your opening size and a photo on WhatsApp (+91 80808 07220) or the form below — we respond with a recommendation and budget the same working day.
texts.t039: GI, aluminium, polycarbonate & India's only 100% Indian-make full-length transparent shutter.
texts.t040: Rapid roll PVC doors up to 100 RPM-class SIE40–SIE100 motors for hygiene, logistics and cold chain.
texts.t041: Insulated overhead sectional doors, stacking doors and residential garage automation with SIE16/36 openers.
texts.t042: Swing & sliding gate automation — 21 swing motor models, telescopic and cantilever systems.
texts.t043: Sensor sliding doors, telescopic and hermetic doors for retail, hospitals and offices.
texts.t044: India's only 100% Indian-make transparent polycarbonate folding door.
texts.t045: 2nd-gen brushless boom barriers (1.5–8 s, IP44), road blockers, bollards & parking management.
texts.t046: Hydraulic dock levelers, dock shelters, scissor lifts and complete loading-bay solutions.
texts.t047: Motorised louvered pergolas, retractable fabric roofs and zip screens for outdoor living.
texts.t048: Insulated hinged & sliding cold room doors, freezer doors with heater frames.
texts.t049: Straight & telescopic industrial sliding doors, fire-station and hangar doors.
texts.t050: SS-304 fire-rated doors, clean-room flush doors and metal fire doors.
texts.t051: Tripod, flap and full-height turnstiles — SIE-M1000/M2000/A2000/FB800/FH5000.
texts.t052: SIE motor range, control boards, remotes, photocells and genuine spares.
texts.t053: Installation walk-throughs, product demos and service tips.
texts.t054: Latest site photos and project reels from across India.

texts.t057: Share your opening size and a photo — our Mumbai engineering desk replies with the right system and budget.
texts.t058: Part of the MK family — India's oldest name in entrance automation, since 1980. Four decades of openings, closings and everything in between.
texts.t080: High-speed doors, dock levelers, shelters and sectional doors for fast, sealed loading bays.
texts.t081: Hermetic doors, clean-room flush doors, SS-304 fire doors and interlocked rapid doors.
texts.t082: Freezer high-speed doors, insulated cold-room doors and strip curtains.
texts.t083: Gate automation, garage doors, boom barriers and video-integrated access.
